title: Dynamic Code Evaluation
description: Passing user-controlled strings to eval(), exec(), compile(), or Function() constructors allows arbitrary code execution, equivalent to deserialization attacks (OWASP A08:2021 / CWE-94).

finding.message: Dynamic code evaluation with potential user input at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Never pass user-controlled data to eval(), exec(), or dynamic code evaluation functions.
Replace dynamic evaluation with explicit dispatch tables or configuration-driven logic.
Use sandboxed evaluation environments (PyPy sandbox, Deno with --allow-none) only as a last resort.
